summary: Validated P0 403-storm fix. Ran Jest suites (13/13 PASS), production build (exit 0), and browser-idle tests as admin and auditor for 60s each. No uncaught axios rejections, no 'Request failed with status code 403' console errors, no ErrorBoundary overlay, and no 403 network calls surfaced during idle for either role. Global unhandledrejection listener verified via synthetic PromiseRejectionEvent - suppressed cleanly without producing any red console error. RBAC untouched: no endpoint was found to be silently allowed; the fix only tames error surfacing.
critical_code_review_comments: api.js: 403 tagging (isAuthDenied/handled) + one-time unhandledrejection listener implemented correctly and guarded by window.__nms_rejection_installed. Global handler only preventDefault()s on status===403 or isAuthDenied=true; 500s and other errors still propagate as intended.
ErrorBoundary.jsx wraps <BrowserRouter> at App root (App.js line 64) - correct placement to catch render-time crashes in any route.

permissions.js exports a synchronous can(role, ...perms) helper - matches backend catalog naming. Not yet consumed by existing components; only useful when new components opportunistically call it before firing fetches (as documented).
TimeClock.jsx unused-hook-dep warning during build (missing 'load' in useEffect deps) - not a blocker, but worth cleanup in a future pass.
test_credentials: admin@natmedsol.local/Admin!2345 and auditor@natmedsol.local/Auditor!2345 (MFA TOTP secret JBSWY3DPEHPK3PXPJBSWY3DPEHPK3PXP) - both work.
context_for_next_testing_agent: P0 403-storm fix validated end-to-end. Jest 13/13 PASS. Prod build 0 errors. Admin idle-60s on /portal/admin: 0 uncaught axios, 0 'Request failed with status code 403', 0 error-boundary overlay, 0 403 network calls. Auditor idle-60s (landed automatically on /portal/admin/audit): same clean result, Audit Log renders with data. Synthetic PromiseRejectionEvent dispatched from console with 403+isAuthDenied produced 0 new console errors, confirming the global unhandledrejection listener swallows it. Only benign console noise observed was 1 'Failed to load resource: 401' on initial auth bootstrap - unrelated to the 403 fix and pre-existing. ErrorBoundary render-crash sanity was not exercised (no easy catch-all route that throws), but the code is trivially correct and wired at App.js:64.

admin_idle_60s.note: Only benign 401 on initial resource load - unrelated to 403 fix

auditor_idle_60s.note: Audit log page renders cleanly with data; only benign 401 on initial resource load

synthetic_403_promise_rejection.verdict: Global unhandledrejection listener correctly suppressed the 403
